mapper.select: select * from ai_message where user_id = #{userId} order by id desc limit 20
mapper.insert: insert into ai_message (id, user_id, role, msg_type, content, image_url, personality_id) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{msgType}, #{content}, #{imageUrl}, #{personalityId})
mapper.delete: delete from ai_personality where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into ai_personality (user_id, name, avatar, system_prompt, is_active, is_preset) values (#{userId}, #{name}, #{avatar}, #{systemPrompt}, #{isActive}, #{isPreset})
mapper.select: select * from ai_personality where user_id = #{userId} and is_active = 1
select avatar from ai_personality where user_id = #{userId} and is_active = 1
